metadata.challenge_summary: The team must pre-plan extraction, decide who carries the object, and decide when the rear guard stops delaying and runs.
dilemmas: The barbarian carries safely but is needed to hold pursuers
The elf extracts quickly but is fragile
Fighting every pursuer loses the clock
warden_runbook: Use pursuers to force handoff decisions
Do not body-block the exit without warning
metadata.lite_focus: Four-room extraction race with a mauler near the objective and a lower return route that can be pre-cleared.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: assign carrier, escort, and rear guard before pursuit pressure peaks
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the declared MARL axis: cooperative extraction under pursuit
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: coordinate extraction once the objective is secured

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Cinder Exit is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

middle_room.name: Middle Room
middle_room.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: cooperative extraction under pursuit.

objective_room.name: Objective Room
objective_room.description: The core object of the lite challenge is visible here; taking it should trigger extraction thinking, not exhaustive exploration.

lower_route.name: Lower Route
lower_route.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Cinder Route Sign
furniture.description: Primary clue object for cooperative extraction under pursuit. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains cooperative extraction under pursuit.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: Four-room extraction race with a mauler near the objective and a lower return route that can be pre-cleared.

core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Use pursuers to force handoff decisions
pressure the declared MARL axis: cooperative extraction under pursuit
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

tusk_mauler_1.name: Cinder Mauler
tusk_mauler_1.public_summary: Lite boss for cooperative extraction under pursuit; it should test coordination before raw damage.
tusk_mauler_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
tusk_mauler_1.defeat_description: Defeat Cinder Mauler after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
